note: Free open-source solver bundled with PuLP. Use HiGHS for better performance (pip install highspy).
Maximum solve time in seconds before returning best found solution.
Stop when gap between best integer solution and LP bound is below 1%.
0 = ignore manual_disruptions_template.csv (deterministic baseline). Set to 1 ONLY when GUI has submitted explicit disruption events.
1 = R3 output routing is a free decision variable (y_b in {0
column4: 1}). 0 = R3 always outputs to L2 (fixed mode).
